mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_social_profiles (user_id, display_name, tagline, location, website_url, social_links, reading_visibility, annotation_visibility, profile_theme, total_followers, total_following, is_verified, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{displayName}, #{tagline}, #{location}, #{websiteUrl}, #{socialLinks, typeHandler=com.masasilam.app.typehandler.JsonStringTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{readingVisibility}, #{annotationVisibility}, #{profileTheme}, 0, 0, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_social_profiles SET display_name = #{displayName}, tagline = #{tagline}, location = #{location}, website_url = #{websiteUrl}, social_links = #{socialLinks, typeHandler=com.masasilam.app.typehandler.JsonStringTypeHandler}::jsonb, reading_visibility = #{readingVisibility}, annotation_visibility = #{annotationVisibility}, profile_theme = #{profileTheme}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, sp.tagline, sp.location, sp.website_url, sp.social_links, sp.reading_visibility, sp.profile_theme, sp.is_verified, COALESCE(sp.total_followers, 0) AS total_followers, COALESCE(sp.total_following, 0) AS total_following, COALESCE(u.total_books_read, 0) AS total_books_read, COALESCE(u.reading_streak_days, 0) AS reading_streak_days, COALESCE(u.contributed_books_count, 0) AS contributed_books_count, COALESCE(u.average_rating, 0.0) AS average_rating, COALESCE(u.experience_points, 0) AS experience_points, COALESCE(u.level, '1') AS level, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND following_id = u.id) ELSE FALSE END AS is_following, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = u.id AND following_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ELSE FALSE END AS is_followed_by, u.created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.is_active = TRUE

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, sp.tagline, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follows f2 WHERE f2.follower_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND f2.following_id = u.id) ELSE FALSE END AS is_following, uf.created_at AS followed_at FROM user_follows uf JOIN users u ON u.id = uf.follower_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} AND u.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, sp.tagline, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follows f2 WHERE f2.follower_id = #{currentUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND f2.following_id = u.id) ELSE FALSE END AS is_following, uf.created_at AS followed_at FROM user_follows uf JOIN users u ON u.id = uf.following_id LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} AND u.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE following_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
